q: Do you like looking at drawings or paintings?
examiner_note: Nói về cảm xúc khi xem tranh. Sử dụng 'rewarding', 'analyze techniques', 'silent conversation', 'transported'.

band7.text: I do. I find it very rewarding to analyze the techniques and emotions that an artist has put into their work. It’s like having a silent conversation with the creator across time and space. It makes me feel more connected to human history.
band7.note: Sử dụng ẩn dụ tốt (silent conversation) và giải thích ý nghĩa.

band8.text: Definitely. I find that a well-executed painting has the power to transport me to a different place or time. I appreciate the way artists use light and color to evoke specific moods and tell stories without using any words. It’s a very evocative and enriching experience.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng hay (well-executed, transport, evoke, evocative, enriching).

band9.text: I find immense pleasure in the contemplation of visual art. There’s something deeply satisfying about deciphering the layers of meaning and the technical prowess behind a compelling painting. It’s an intellectual and emotional journey that often provides a fresh perspective on the complexities of the human experience.
band9.note: Sử dụng từ vựng ở mức độ cao nhất (contemplation, deciphering, technical prowess, complexities).

v.example: The music was very evocative of the seaside.
I'm trying to decipher his handwriting.
He spent the day in quiet contemplation.

advanced_vocab.meaning: sự dũng mãnh/kỹ năng điêu luyện
advanced_vocab.example: He is famous for his physical prowess.

similar_questions: Why do people buy paintings to hang in their homes?
